files.patch:

 jobs:
   macos-host:
     runs-on: macos-latest

     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
       - name: Swift version

       - name: Test (macOS)

         run: swift test
 
   apple-simulators:
@@ -59,15 +58,13 @@ jobs:
   linux:
     runs-on: ubuntu-24.04
     needs: macos-host

     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
       - uses: SwiftyLab/setup-swift@v1
         with:
           swift-version: '6.2'
       - name: Test (Linux)

         run: swift test
 
   android:
